blocks.content: To establish the Halo, Shirone needed to infinitely expand the Immortal Function.
However, since he had already grasped the concept of a perfect circle, he could simplify the mechanism from the second attempt onward.
A Lifting target is highly sensitive to changes in mental state.
Therefore, if the mind remains in absolute stability, the target should not move.
This meant that it would soon be possible to draw a perfect circle without entering the realm of infinity.
From that point on, instead of regular Lifting training, Shirone focused on keeping the target completely still.
After a month, he started seeing some results.
It was always fascinating to see a target, with maximum repulsive force, floating calmly within the Spirit Zone.
This was something only Shirone could achieve, having grasped the sense of a perfect circle through the Immortal Function.
The students kept expressing their admiration, but they couldn't understand why Shirone was practicing this way.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: He's been doing that since last month, and yet he can't even hold it for 10 seconds.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: He's not a monk, so why go that far? How does this even help with magic?
The target floating above Shirone showed no signs of movement.
This meant that his mental state was completely undisturbed.
It was akin to a brain-dead state, a mental condition that a normal human couldn't maintain.
Only Shirone, who had reached the state of Indestructible Diamond, could manage it.
However, even Shirone couldn't hold out for more than 10 seconds.
Eventually, the target began to shake violently and flew out of the Spirit Zone.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: It seems to have gotten a little bigger….

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Huh? What's gotten bigger?

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: His Spirit Zone. It seems bigger than last time.
Closer and Savina looked at Shirone again.
Even with their eyes, it was clear that it had grown larger than before.

blocks.speaker: Closer
blocks.content: No way. If it were that easy to grow Spirit Zone, there wouldn't be anyone in the world who isn't archmage.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Usually, you have to go through ascetism or gain some enlightenment… Wait, enlightenment?
Savina realized from her own words that while mage do undergo awakenings, the Spirit Zone, being a pure mental entity, is more closely related to a state of spiritual pursuit.
This was why Ethella, a bishop of the Karsys Holy Order, was also renowned as a Zoner throughout the kingdom.
Savina's prediction was correct.
Having reached the state of Indestructible Diamond, Shirone had broken through the limits of expanding his mind.
In the meantime, as he continued to spin in perfect circles, his Spirit Zone was strengthening at an incredible speed.
Even as Closer and Savina continued to spew out belittling remarks as if they could not accept it, Dante silently looked at Shirone.
The time for the Heaven's Trial class had come again.
The three teachers, Ethella, Sienna, and Thad, were in charge of the class, and now the students accepted it as a given.
Sienna took the lead and led the class.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Starting today, we will be learning about interpersonal combat. It differs significantly from tactical training, so please follow the instructions carefully.
Interpersonal combat had many differences from tactical training.
First of all, because powerful magic exchanges occurred, the gauge depleted much faster.
In other words, the intensity of anti-magic would increase.
Moreover, the problem was that a 'push' judgment could also apply to people, but only in the case of passive skills.
A typical example of an accident was when two mages who had cast teleportation collided with each other midway.
If that happened, no matter how virtual reality it was, it would inevitably lead to serious injuries.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: The reason why three instructors are supervising this lesson is due to the risks associated with interpersonal combat.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: First of all, since today is the first day, we will start with the practical exercises.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: I'll do it.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Very well. As for Boyle's opponent...

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Teacher, may I choose my opponent as well?

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: I'll do it.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Me? You want to go against me right now?

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: That's right. You've been acting all high and mighty, so you won't back down now, will you?

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: If you're really that great, prove it with your skills.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Are you so desperate to beat me? No matter what?

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Don't get me wrong. I'm the rightful top student in the advanced class, so the challenge is yours.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: So why don't you come up? I'll straighten out that rotten attitude of yours.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Hahaha! Great words! How about this then? The loser has to kneel and admit defeat to the winner.

blocks.speaker: Ethella
blocks.content: Dante, this is strictly part of the class….

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: It's fine. Please allow it, Teacher Ethella. In fact, this is exactly what I wanted.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Last semester, I was the second-best in the advanced class, just barely.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Do you know why I deliberately didn't move up to the graduation class and stayed here?

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Because I thought I was still lacking.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Yeah, that seems about right.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: But not anymore. I've put in four years of hard work, and I finally succeeded over this break.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: My familiar will tear you apart.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: I look forward to it. Honestly, Merces was a bit of a letdown.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Don't worry. This time will be different.
As Sienna shouted to start the battle, Boyle and Dante entered their Spirit Zone at the same time.
As the sequence method unfolds, their minds were strengthened, and the Spirit Zones took on their respective formations.
Boyle's formation was defensive, while Dante's was a targeting type.

blocks.speaker: Boyle
blocks.content: Come forth, Gaos.
Where Boyle reached out, another Boyle was born.
Following the profound mystery of a mage's doppelgänger transforming into the doppelgänger of a summoned familiar, it then transformed into the 6th-tier familiar, Gaos.
Gwaaaaaaaaa!
A monstrous creature, standing 3 meters tall, assumed a quadrupedal stance.
Its smooth, hairless skin was a bluish color, and its muscles were split like rocks.
The body was similar to a human's, but it had no eyes, as if it was wearing an eyepatch, and its entire face from the bridge of its nose to its jaw was just one large mouth.
Inside, sparsely spaced fangs were entwined with straw-like tongues, and along its spine, from the neck down, protruded tentacles that emitted electricity.
Its hands had four fingers, with 10-centimeter-long nails as hard as diamonds.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Ga- Gaos. He really summoned Gaos.
The students were stunned.
They had heard that Boyle had been training hard over the break, but they never imagined it would be to summon Gaos.
Gaos is among the top-tier of the 6th-tier familiars, and in terms of physical abilities alone, it could even compete with some 5th-tier monsters.
The teachers were just as shocked.
Although there were no summoning mages in the current graduating class, very few students in the academy's history had ever managed to summon a 6th-tier familiar before graduation.

blocks.speaker: Thad
blocks.content: My goodness. When did he learn summoning magic like that? The time constraints over the break should have made that impossible.

blocks.speaker: Ethella
blocks.content: He must have been planning this for a long time. That kid has been preparing for this all along.
The cunning of the younger generation was enough to make one shake their head in disbelief.
Whether in the advanced or graduation classes, mages are generally weak in physical strength.
By summoning Gaos, a creature with physical abilities around the 5th tier, Boyle had a much easier path to passing the graduation exam.
